title: 10 best herbal capsules for shortness of breath
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for shortness of breath are natural supplements designed to alleviate respiratory discomfort and improve lung function. They help by increasing oxygenation, reducing inflammation, and enhancing overall cardiovascular health. The best herbal capsules for shortness of breath include Ginkgo biloba, Panax ginseng, Astragalus membranaceus, Zingiber officinale, Withania somnifera, Ephedra sinica, Echinacea purpurea, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Schisandra chinensis, and Curcuma longa. If left untreated, shortness of breath can significantly impact daily life, limiting physical activity, causing anxiety, and affecting mental well-being, ultimately hindering one's ability to work, socialize, and enjoy life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain a unique blend of antioxidants, flavonoids, and saponins that work together to relax and open up airways. The herb's natural properties help to reduce inflammation in the lungs, allowing for easier breathing and improved oxygen intake. Additionally, maidenhair tree capsules have been shown to strengthen the body's natural defenses against respiratory stressors, further reducing symptoms of shortness of breath and improving overall lung function.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain antioxidants like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, alleviating shortness of breath symptoms.
Bronchodilatory effects: The capsules contain compounds that relax airway smooth muscle, allowing for easier breathing and reduced bronchospasm, thus relieving shortness of breath.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Maidenhair tree capsules have anti-inflammatory compounds like triterpenoids and saponins, which help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, further contributing to alleviating shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Flavonoids: These polyphenolic compounds have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation in the lungs, alleviating shortness of breath.

Terpenoids (specifically, bilobalide): Bilobalide has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help protect lung tissue and improve oxygenation, reducing shortness of breath.

Ginkgolides: These sesquiterpenoid lactones have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the lungs, improving lung function and reducing shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Used because they are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to improve circulation and reduce inflammation in the lungs.
Seeds: Used because they contain a high amount of ginkgolic acids, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve oxygenation in the lungs.
Barks: Used because they contain flavonoids and terpenoids similar to the leaves, which may help to improve circulation and reduce inflammation in the lungs.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 100 grams of ginkgo biloba leaves and stems dried to a moisture content of 10 percent.
Grind the dried ginkgo biloba into a fine powder using a mill with 40-mesh sieve.
Mix the ginkgo biloba powder with 50 grams of gelatin and 10 grams of glycerin.
Fill a capsule machine with the ginkgo biloba mixture and press out 100 capsules in 10 minutes.
Label and package the herbal ginkgo biloba capsules in airtight containers within 24 hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Siberian ginseng capsules helps with shortness of breath because it has been traditionally used to enhance respiratory function and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory diseases. The herb is believed to increase oxygen supply to the body, improving lung function and reducing fatigue. Additionally, Siberian ginseng's adaptogenic properties may help the body adapt to stress and environmental factors that can exacerbate breathing difficulties. By supporting overall respiratory health, Siberian ginseng capsules may provide relief from shortness of breath, allowing individuals to breathe easier and feel more energized.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic effects: Siberian Ginseng's adaptogenic properties help the body adapt to stress, which can improve lung function and increase oxygen intake, reducing feelings of shortness of breath.
Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants in Siberian Ginseng capsules help neutralize free radicals that can damage lung tissue and exacerbate respiratory issues like shortness of breath.

Immunomodulatory effects: Siberian Ginseng's immunomodulatory properties may help regulate the immune system's response to infection, which can reduce inflammation in the lungs and alleviate symptoms of shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Saponins: Saponins in Eleutherococcus senticosus help with shortness of breath by reducing inflammation and improving lung function, which can alleviate respiratory distress.

Polysaccharides: Polysaccharides in Eleutherococcus senticosus capsules may help with shortness of breath by enhancing immune function and reducing oxidative stress, which can help alleviate respiratory symptoms.

Eleutherosides: Eleutherosides in Eleutherococcus senticosus may help with shortness of breath by improving cardiovascular function, reducing blood pressure, and enhancing lung function, which can alleviate respiratory distress.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used due to their high content of eleutherosides, which are believed to have adaptogenic properties that may help alleviate respiratory issues.
Barks: Barks are used as they contain eleutherosides and other compounds that may help improve cardiovascular function and reduce stress, which can contribute to shortness of breath.
Stems: Stems are used due to their high content of eleutherosides, which may help improve physical endurance and reduce fatigue, potentially alleviating shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1-2 kilograms of the roots of eleutherococcus senticosus when they are mature and the plants are in dormancy stage.
Clean the harvested roots thoroughly with water to remove any dirt or debris.
Dry the cleaned roots in a warm place at a temperature of 50-60°c for 3-4 days.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a mill or grinder with a 40-mesh sieve.
Encapsulate the powder in gelatin or vegetarian capsules in the amount of 250-500 milligrams per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Brahmi capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain the herb Bacopa monnieri, which has been traditionally used to improve respiratory function and reduce symptoms of bronchitis. The capsules help to relax the airways, making it easier for air to flow in and out of the lungs. Additionally, Brahmi's anti-inflammatory properties may help to reduce inflammation in the lungs, further alleviating shortness of breath. By promoting healthy lung function, Brahmi capsules can provide relief from this common respiratory issue.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic Properties: Brahmi's adaptogenic properties help to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common underlying causes of shortness of breath, by normalizing cortisol levels and promoting relaxation.

Antioxidant Activity: The antioxidants present in Brahmi capsules help to protect the lungs from damage caused by free radicals, reducing inflammation and oxidative stress that can contribute to shortness of breath.
Bronchodilatory Effects: Brahmi's bronchodilatory properties help to relax and dilate the airways, making it easier to breathe and alleviating symptoms of shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Bacosides: Bacosides are a group of triterpenoid saponins found in Bacopa monnieri, which may help alleviate shortness of breath by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the lungs.
Bacopaside I: Bacopaside I is a triterpenoid saponin with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect the lungs from damage and reduce symptoms of shortness of breath.

Monnierin: Monnierin is a phenylethanoid glycoside with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the lungs, thereby alleviating shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Bacopa monnieri leaves are commonly used to make capsules for shortness of breath due to their high concentration of bacosides, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help improve respiratory function.

Roots: Bacopa monnieri roots are used to make capsules for shortness of breath because they contain a higher concentration of bacosides and other bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health.

Stems: Bacopa monnieri stems are also used to make capsules for shortness of breath, as they contain similar bioactive compounds to the roots and leaves, which help to improve respiratory function and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of bacopa monnieri roots and leaves from a pesticide-free area.
Dry the harvested plant material in a single layer at 40 degrees celsius for 3 days.
Grind 250 grams of dried bacopa monnieri into a fine powder using a mill.
Mix the ground powder with 125 grams of gelatin and 25 grams of glycerin.
Fill a capsule machine with the mixture and produce 1000 herbal capsules.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain adaptogenic properties that help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common contributors to respiratory issues. The herb's antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects also work to calm the respiratory system, reducing inflammation and congestion that can cause shortness of breath. Additionally, ashwagandha has been shown to improve lung function and increase oxygen levels in the body, making it easier to breathe deeply and comfortably.

Antioxidant Properties: Ashwagandha's antioxidant properties can help combat oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, which can contribute to breathing difficulties.
Anti-inflammatory Properties: Ashwagandha has been shown to reduce inflammation in the body, including in the respiratory system, which can help ease symptoms of shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Withanolides: These steroidal lactones help with shortness of breath by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the lungs, thereby improving breathing capacity.
Withanone: As an alkaloid, withanone has anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, which can contribute to shortness of breath.

Withaferin A: This withanolide has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help protect the lungs from damage caused by free radicals and reduce inflammation, ultimately improving lung function and alleviating shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds, including withanolides, which are believed to help alleviate respiratory issues.
Seeds: They are used as they contain withanolides and other nutrients that may help reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function.
Leaves: They are used as they are rich in antioxidants and other compounds that may help alleviate oxidative stress and improve breathing.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 500 grams of dried withania somnifera roots and cut them into small pieces.
Use a mortar and pestle to grind the withania somnifera pieces into a fine powder.
Mix 20 grams of the powder with 80 grams of a binding agent like gum arabic.
Fill an encapsulation machine with the powder and binding agent mixture.
Use the machine to create 500 capsules with a 500 milligram fill weight each.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain curcumin, a powerful compound that reduces inflammation in the lungs. Chronic inflammation can lead to bronchial constriction and increased mucus production, exacerbating breathing difficulties. The anti-inflammatory properties of turmeric capsules help alleviate this inflammation, allowing airways to open up and making it easier to breathe. Additionally, curcumin's antioxidant capabilities protect lung tissue from further damage, promoting overall respiratory health and alleviating symptoms of shortness of breath.
remedy_properties: Curcumin: The active compound in turmeric has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the lungs and alleviate breathing difficulties associated with conditions like chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) and bronchitis.

Antioxidant activity: Turmeric's antioxidants may help neutralize free radicals that can damage lung tissue and contribute to shortness of breath, potentially improving respiratory function and reducing symptoms of respiratory diseases.

Inflammation reduction: Turmeric has been shown to inhibit the production of inflammatory cytokines, which are involved in the pathogenesis of respiratory diseases like asthma and chronic bronchitis, helping to reduce inflammation and alleviate shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Curcumin: Curcumin helps alleviate shortness of breath by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the lungs, which can contribute to respiratory issues.
Demethoxycurcumin (DMC): DMC exhibits anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to ease respiratory congestion and reduce symptoms of shortness of breath.
Turmerone: Turmerone has anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help break down mucus and reduce inflammation in the lungs, making it easier to breathe.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are the primary part used due to their high concentration of curcumin, a bioactive compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help alleviate respiratory issues.
Roots: Roots of Curcuma longa are also used as they contain curcumin and other active compounds that can help reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function.
Seeds: Seeds are sometimes used as they contain a higher concentration of volatile oils, which may help alleviate respiratory issues such as shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of dried rhizomes of curcuma longa.
Grind the rhizomes into a fine powder using a mill or grinder.
Mix 1-2 teaspoons of the powder with 10-15 grams of gelatin.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the mixture and seal them.
Store the capsules in an airtight container for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain compounds that help to relax airway muscles, reducing inflammation and constriction. This can make it easier for air to flow in and out of the lungs, alleviating feelings of shortness of breath. Additionally, ginger's anti-inflammatory properties may also help to reduce swelling in the airways, further improving breathing function.
remedy_properties: Inflammation reduction: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, which can relieve constriction and ease breathing difficulties.
Expectorant properties: The saponins and flavonoids present in ginger capsules help loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory tract, making it easier to breathe and reducing congestion.

Bronchodilatory effects: Ginger's bioactive compounds, such as gingerol, can directly relax bronchial smooth muscle, helping to dilate airways and improve lung function, thus alleviating symptoms of shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Gingerols: These compounds, particularly [6]-gingerol, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe.
Shogaols: Similar to gingerols, shogaols have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that help loosen and clear mucus from the airways, relieving congestion and shortness of breath.

Volatile oils (mainly Zingiberene and Bisabolol): These volatile oils have anti-inflammatory and bronchodilatory effects, which help relax the airway muscles and improve airflow, reducing shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Roots: They are used because they also contain similar active compounds found in rhizomes, which help in reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function.
Leaves: They are used because they contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in alleviating respiratory issues such as shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Harvest zingiber officinale roots in late summer to early fall when the plant is mature and the rhizomes are fully formed.
Dry the harvested roots in a warm and well-ventilated area for 2-3 weeks to reduce moisture content.
Grind the dried roots into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground zingiber officinale powder with a gelatin or vegetarian capsule filler in a 1:2 ratio by weight.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with the zingiber officinale and capsule filler mixture using a capsule filling machine.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Garlic capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain a concentrated form of allicin, a natural compound found in garlic that has potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Allicin helps to dilate blood vessels, increasing oxygen flow to the lungs and improving respiratory function. Additionally, garlic's antimicrobial properties can help combat infections that may contribute to shortness of breath. By addressing these underlying issues, herbal garlic capsules can provide effective relief from shortness of breath and improve overall respiratory health.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Garlic's antioxidants, such as allicin, help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, which can contribute to shortness of breath.

Cardiovascular benefits: Herbal garlic capsules may improve cardiovascular health by lowering blood pressure, reducing blood vessel constriction, and preventing blood clots, all of which can alleviate shortness of breath caused by heart or lung conditions.
Antimicrobial properties: Garlic's antimicrobial compounds may help combat infections that can cause respiratory issues, such as bronchitis or pneumonia, which often lead to shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Allicin: Allicin, a sulfur-containing compound, helps with shortness of breath by relaxing airway smooth muscles and increasing lung capacity, thereby improving breathing.
Quercetin: Quercetin, a flavonoid phenolic compound, helps with shortness of breath by reducing inflammation in the airways, which can contribute to breathing difficulties.

Diallyl disulfide: Diallyl disulfide, a sulfur-containing compound, helps with shortness of breath by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which can help alleviate airway constriction and improve lung function.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are the most commonly used part for their medicinal properties, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function.
Flowers: Flowers of Allium sativum are used to make capsules that help alleviate shortness of breath due to their expectorant properties, which aid in relieving congestion.

Seeds: Seeds of Allium sativum are used to make capsules that help alleviate shortness of breath due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which aid in reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30g of dried allium sativum roots from a trusted supplier or your own garden when mature.
Crush 15g of the harvested roots into a fine powder using a high-speed grinder for 30 seconds.
Mix 2g of the powdered allium sativum with 8g of cellulose and 5g of starch in a bowl.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filling machine.
Store the capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain menthol, a natural expectorant that loosens and clears mucus from the lungs. This allows for easier breathing and reduced congestion. Additionally, peppermint's anti-inflammatory properties help to relax bronchial muscles, reducing spasms and constriction that can contribute to shortness of breath. By addressing these underlying factors, herbal peppermint capsules can provide relief and improve overall lung function, making it a natural remedy for individuals experiencing shortness of breath.
remedy_properties: Menthol: Menthol helps to thin mucus and reduce its viscosity, making it easier to expel from the lungs and airways, which can alleviate symptoms of shortness of breath caused by respiratory congestion.

Volatile oils: The volatile oils present in peppermint capsules, such as menthone and menthyl acetate, have a bronchodilatory effect, which means they help to relax the airway muscles and increase airflow into the lungs, reducing feelings of shortness of breath.

Antioxidants: Peppermint contains antioxidants like flavonoids and phenolic acids that can help to reduce inflammation in the airways and protect against oxidative stress, both of which can contribute to chronic respiratory conditions that cause shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Linalool: Acts as a bronchodilator, helping to relax airway muscles and improve breathing by increasing airflow into the lungs.
Menthol: Exhibits expectorant properties, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the airways, thereby reducing congestion and improving breathing.
Volatile oils (specifically, limonene and beta-pinene): Possess anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation in the airways, which may contribute to shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Leaves: They are the most commonly used part due to their high concentration of menthol, which can help ease respiratory issues and relieve shortness of breath.
Stems: The stems of Mentha x piperita contain menthol and other compounds that can help to relax the airways and reduce inflammation, making them useful for shortness of breath.
Roots: The roots of the plant also contain menthol and other bioactive compounds that can help to calm the respiratory system and alleviate shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 1 part of fresh leaves and flowers of mentha x piperita and dry them for 2 weeks to preserve their potency.
Weigh 250 milligrams of dried leaves and flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the ground powder with 250 milligrams of gelatin and 20 milliliters of water in a small bowl to create a uniform blend.
Use a capsule machine to fill empty vegetarian capsules with the herbal mixture and seal them properly.
Label and store the capsules in a cool dark place for up to 2 years after preparation and usage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain the potent herb Thymus vulgaris, which has been traditionally used to alleviate respiratory issues. The active compounds in thyme, such as thymol and carvacrol, have natural bronchodilatory properties that help relax airway muscles and reduce inflammation. This allows for easier breathing and increased oxygen flow, providing relief from shortness of breath. Additionally, thyme's antimicrobial properties may help combat respiratory infections that can exacerbate shortness of breath.
remedy_properties: Thymol: Thymol, a compound found in thyme, has been shown to have bronchodilatory effects, helping to relax airway muscles and increase airflow, which can alleviate symptoms of shortness of breath.

Flavonoids: The flavonoids present in thyme, such as rosmarinic acid, have anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, which can contribute to shortness of breath.

Essential oils: Thyme essential oil contains compounds like borneol and bornyl acetate, which have been shown to have expectorant properties, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory tract and make breathing easier.
remedy_constituents: Thymol: Thymol helps with shortness of breath by its bronchodilatory properties, which enable the airways to open and allow easier breathing.
Carvacrol: Carvacrol has anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce inflammation in the airways, thereby alleviating shortness of breath in individuals with respiratory conditions.
Rosmarinic acid: Rosmarinic acid has antioxidant properties that can help protect the airways from oxidative stress, which may contribute to the development of shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Thyme leaves are used to make capsules for shortness of breath due to their high concentration of thymol, which has expectorant properties.
Stems: Thyme stems are used to make capsules for shortness of breath due to their content of volatile oils that help relieve respiratory issues.
Barks: Thyme barks are used to make capsules for shortness of breath due to their flavonoids and phenolic compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of fresh thymus vulgaris leaves and flowers from a pesticide-free area on a sunny day.
Dry the harvested thymus vulgaris in a single layer at 40°c for 24 hours using a food dehydrator.
Grind 20 grams of dried thymus vulgaris into a fine powder using a coffee grinder.
Mix the powdered thymus vulgaris with 100 grams of gelatin capsules in a 1:5 ratio.
Fill 100 empty gelatin capsules with the thymus vulgaris mixture and seal them immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tasmanian blue gum capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain a potent blend of herbal extracts that work in harmony to alleviate respiratory issues. The capsules' active ingredients, including eucalyptus and menthol, help to relax and open up airways, reducing inflammation and congestion. This allows for easier breathing and increased oxygen intake, providing relief from shortness of breath. Additionally, the capsules' anti-inflammatory properties may also help to soothe and calm the respiratory system, promoting overall respiratory health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Tasmanian Blue Gum Capsules have antioxidant properties that help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to respiratory issues like shortness of breath.

Bronchodilatory effects: The capsules contain compounds that help relax bronchial smooth muscle, making it easier for air to flow into and out of the lungs, relieving constricted airways and alleviating shortness of breath.

Inflammation reduction: Tasmanian Blue Gum Capsules have anti-inflammatory properties that may help reduce inflammation in the respiratory tract, which can contribute to wheezing, coughing, and shortness of breath.
remedy_constituents: Eucalyptol (C10H18O): This terpene acts as a bronchodilator, helping to relax airway muscles and improve airflow, thereby alleviating shortness of breath.
Cineole (C10H18O): Similar to eucalyptol, cineole is a terpene that helps to dilate airways, reducing inflammation and congestion in the lungs, which can contribute to shortness of breath.

α-Pinene (C10H16): As a bronchodilator and anti-inflammatory agent, α-pinene helps to ease airway constriction and reduce inflammation, making it easier to breathe and alleviating shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves are used due to their high content of eucalyptol, a natural decongestant that helps relieve shortness of breath.
Barks: The barks are used because they contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate respiratory issues.
Roots: The roots are used for their high content of sesquiterpene, which has been found to exhibit expectorant properties that help relieve bronchial congestion.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20-30 grams of fresh eucalyptus globulus leaves at peak potency early morning after dew evaporates.
Dry the harvested leaves in a single layer at room temperature for 7-10 days or use a dehydrator at 40°c for 2-3 hours.
Chop the dried leaves into small pieces and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or spice grinder for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
Mix 2-3 grams of the powder with a carrier agent like microcrystalline cellulose or starch in a 1:1 ratio to fill capsules.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the powder mixture and seal them according to manufacturer instructions.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain rosmarinic acid, a natural compound that has been shown to relax airway muscles and improve lung function. Additionally, lemon balm's antispasmodic properties help to reduce bronchospasm and ease constriction in the lungs, allowing for easier breathing and increased oxygen intake. By promoting relaxation and reducing inflammation, herbal lemon balm capsules can provide relief from shortness of breath and related respiratory issues.

Calming effect on the nervous system: Lemon balm has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help alleviate anxiety and stress-related shortness of breath by promoting relaxation and reducing hyperventilation.
Anti-inflammatory property: Lemon balm's anti-inflammatory property may help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, which can contribute to shortness of breath and improve lung function.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lemon balm roots have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, including shortness of breath, due to their high concentration of bioactive compounds like volatile oils and flavonoids.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh melissa officinalis leaves and dry them using a food dehydrator at 35°c for 24 hours.
Grind the dried melissa officinalis into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 250mg of powdered melissa officinalis with 500mg of gelatin and 20ml of distilled water to form a homogeneous paste.
Encapsulate the herbal mixture using a capsule machine and fill each capsule with 250mg of the mixture.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months or in the refrigerator for up to 1 year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain Passiflora incarnata, also known as passionflower, which has a long history of use in traditional herbal medicine to alleviate respiratory issues. The herb's active compounds, including flavonoids and alkaloids, work together to calm the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress that can exacerbate shortness of breath. Additionally, maypop capsules have anti-inflammatory properties that help to relax bronchial muscles, making it easier for air to move in and out of the lungs, providing relief from shortness of breath.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Herbal Maypop capsules contain antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, which can contribute to shortness of breath by improving lung function.

Anti-inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds present in Maypop capsules can help reduce inflammation in the airways and lungs, which can alleviate symptoms of shortness of breath caused by conditions like bronchitis or chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).

Expectorant Properties: Maypop capsules have been traditionally used to loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory tract, which can help relieve shortness of breath caused by congestion or phlegm buildup.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Maypop plant have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, including shortness of breath, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties.

Seeds: Maypop seeds contain a compound called passionnol, which has been shown to relax bronchial smooth muscle and reduce inflammation in the lungs, making it effective for treating shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried passionflower herb, finely ground into a powder.
Mix the powdered passionflower herb with 50 grams of pure beeswax and 20 grams of coconut oil.
Combine the mixture in a double boiler and heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, to melt the waxes.
Remove from heat and let cool until solidified, then grind into small pellets.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500mg of the passionflower- beeswax-coconut oil blend.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain a natural compound called valerenic acid, which has been shown to relax the muscles in the airways and improve lung function. This relaxation can help reduce inflammation and ease constriction in the lungs, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, valerian capsules may also have a sedative effect, which can help calm the nervous system and reduce stress-related breathing difficulties.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic properties: Valerian's antispasmodic effects help to relax bronchial smooth muscle, reducing spasms and constriction that can exacerbate shortness of breath.

Anxiolytic and sedative properties: Valerian's anxiolytic and sedative effects can help reduce anxiety-related breathing difficulties and promote relaxation, making it easier to breathe deeply and efficiently.

Vasodilatory properties: Valerian's vasodilatory effects can help widen blood vessels, improving oxygen delivery to the lungs and reducing pulmonary congestion that can contribute to shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Roots: Valerian roots contain a high concentration of valerenic acid, which helps to relax respiratory muscles and reduce inflammation in the lungs, making it effective in alleviating shortness of breath.

Rhyzomes: The rhizome of valerian plant is rich in sesquiterpenes, compounds that have been shown to reduce bronchial constriction and improve lung function, providing relief from shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry high-quality valeriana officinalis roots in a warm, dark place for at least two weeks.
Crush the dried roots into small pieces using a mortar and pestle or a spice grinder.
Mix one part crushed valeriana roots with three parts dried mullein leaves to create a synergistic blend.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250-500 milligrams of the valeriana-mullein blend, taking care not to overfill the capsules.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dark place for up to six months before consumption.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain a natural compound called glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm irritated airways. Additionally, licorice root has been shown to improve lung function by increasing the production of surfactant, a substance that helps reduce inflammation in the lungs and make breathing easier. By reducing inflammation and promoting healthy lung function, herbal licorice capsules may help alleviate symptoms of shortness of breath and provide relief for individuals suffering from respiratory conditions such as bronchitis or asthma.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, making it easier to breathe.

Licoricidin: This compound has antioxidant properties, which can help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, reducing the severity of respiratory symptoms such as shortness of breath.
Glycyrrhetinic acid: This compound has a bronchodilatory effect, meaning it can help relax and open up airways, making it easier to breathe.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the licorice plant contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that helps to soothe and calm the airways, relieving symptoms of shortness of breath.
Barks: Licorice barks are rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce inflammation in the respiratory tract and alleviate shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Dry freshly harvested licorice root in a warm oven at 60 degrees celsius for two hours.
Grind dried licorice root into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix one part licorice root powder with three parts filler material such as potato starch or silica gel.
Fill empty capsules with the powdered mixture and seal according to manufacturer's instructions.
Store prepared capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain compounds that help to relax the airways, making it easier to breathe. The herb's anti-inflammatory properties also reduce swelling in the lungs and air passages, further opening up breathing pathways. Additionally, sage has natural bronchodilatory effects, allowing for more efficient gas exchange between oxygen and carbon dioxide, leading to improved oxygenation of the body and relief from shortness of breath.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Sage's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as rosmarinic acid, can help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, making it easier to breathe.

Antioxidant properties: Sage's antioxidants can neutralize free radicals and reduce oxidative stress, which may contribute to shortness of breath by protecting the lungs from damage and improving their function.
Expectorant properties: Sage contains compounds that help loosen and clear mucus from the airways, making it easier to breathe by reducing congestion and coughing.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots are used due to their high concentration of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help alleviate respiratory issues.
Barks: The barks of the sage plant contain salutaridine, a compound that helps relax bronchial muscles and reduce inflammation in the airways.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried salvia officinalis herb in quantities of 20g for every 100 capsules you plan to fill.
Grind the dried herb into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or spice grinder.
Mix the powdered herb with 10-15% silica filler to improve flowability and facilitate capsule filling.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the herbal mixture in quantities of 200-250mg per capsule allowing for easy swallowing.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool dark place for up to one year or as needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wild marjoram capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain thymol, a natural compound that has been shown to relax airway muscles and open up airways, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, the capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling in the lungs and bronchial tubes, further alleviating respiratory distress. As a result, wild marjoram capsules can provide effective relief for individuals experiencing shortness of breath due to chronic conditions like COPD or asthma.
remedy_properties: Expectorant Properties: Wild Marjoram's expectorant properties help loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, allowing for easier breathing and reducing symptoms of shortness of breath.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Wild Marjoram's anti-inflammatory compounds reduce inflammation in the airways, which can contribute to shortness of breath by constricting air passages and making it harder to breathe.

Antioxidant Properties: Wild Marjoram's antioxidants help protect the lungs from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate respiratory issues like shortness of breath and chronic bronchitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of wild marjoram are used to make capsules for shortness of breath due to their calming and soothing properties, which help to reduce inflammation in the airways.
Flowers: Wild marjoram flowers are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, making them effective in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the lungs, alleviating symptoms of shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried origanum vulgare leaves from a reputable source to ensure potency.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm place or using a dehydrator for 24 hours to remove excess moisture.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes to enhance extraction.
Mix 200mg of the ground origanum vulgare with 100mg of gelatin and fill capsules using a capsule machine within 30 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or refrigerate for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain the soothing properties of chamomile, a natural herb that has been used for centuries to calm the respiratory system. When taken as a capsule, chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds work to ease congestion and relax the airways, allowing for easier breathing. Additionally, its calming effects on the nervous system help reduce stress and anxiety, common triggers of shortness of breath, promoting a sense of relaxation and well-being.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as apigenin and luteolin, may help reduce inflammation in the lungs and airways, which can contribute to shortness of breath by reducing lung swelling and improving airflow.

Muscle relaxant property: The flavonoids present in chamomile capsules, particularly apigenin and quercetin, have been shown to relax smooth muscle tissue in the respiratory tract, making it easier for air to pass through and relieving symptoms of shortness of breath.

Anxiolytic property: Chamomile's ability to calm anxiety and promote relaxation may help reduce breathing rate and depth, allowing for more efficient oxygen exchange and alleviating feelings of shortness of breath.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the chamomile plant contain apigenin, an antioxidant that helps relax airways and reduce inflammation, making it effective in treating shortness of breath.
Flowers: Chamomile flowers have anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe bronchial tubes and alleviate symptoms of shortness of breath.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality matricaria chamomilla flowers in full bloom for optimal potency.
Dry the freshly harvested flowers in a warm, well-ventilated area or using a food dehydrator.
Crush 20 grams of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Fill empty #0 capsules with approximately 200-250 milligrams of the powdered herb and seal tightly.
Store the prepared capsules in an airtight container for up to six months or freeze for longer storage.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of dried lavandula angustifolia flowers from a trusted source.
Grind the dried flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 2000 milligrams of the ground lavender powder with 500 milliliters of cold distilled water.
Steep the mixture in a double boiler for 30 minutes to allow for optimal extraction.
Strain and fill #00 gelatin capsules with the infused liquid, using approximately 250 milligrams per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with shortness of breath because they contain mucilage, a thick, protective coating that soothes and lubricates the respiratory tract. This natural compound reduces inflammation and irritation in the lungs, making it easier to breathe by widening airways and loosening mucus. remedy_recipe: Harvest 20g of dried althaea officinalis roots and clean them thoroughly under running water.
Grind the cleaned althaea officinalis roots into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 5g of the ground root powder with 95g of rice flour to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with 250mg of the blended mixture and seal them promptly.
Label the capsules with the date, ingredient name, and recommended dosage (2-3 times daily).

supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to shortness of breath that are treated with herbal capsules are chronic bronchitis, asthma, and COPD (chronic obstructive pulmonary disease). Herbal capsules containing ingredients like turmeric, ginger, and ashwagandha help to reduce inflammation in the lungs, relax airways, and increase lung function. They also alleviate symptoms like wheezing, coughing, and chest tightness, providing relief for patients suffering from respiratory issues.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best combination of herbal capsules that help with shortness of breath is Ashwagandha, Rhodiola, and Ginkgo Biloba. Ashwagandha helps reduce stress and anxiety that can exacerbate breathing issues, while Rhodiola improves oxygenation and reduces inflammation. Ginkgo Biloba enhances blood flow and improves respiratory function, allowing for better oxygen intake. This trio works synergistically to alleviate shortness of breath, promoting relaxation and respiratory health. Consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal supplements to ensure safe and effective treatment.
intro_study: For example, according to a study published by Recent patents on biotechnology, medicinal plants have been used for centuries to treat respiratory diseases. The study highlights various plant species with therapeutic properties, such as Echinacea purpurea and Zingiber officinale, which have potential for adjuvant symptomatic therapy in conditions like chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), bronchitis, asthma, the common cold, cough, and whooping cough. By utilizing herbal capsules containing these bioactive compounds, individuals experiencing shortness of breath may benefit from the therapeutic applications of these medicinal plants, potentially alleviating their symptoms and improving respiratory health.
